summary: Training Dashboard feature fully verified. Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/training-stats returns correct data. Frontend: Carlos profile shows 'Progreso de Entrenamiento' section with stats (4 orders, 1 bill paid, $640). Admin profile correctly hides training section. Training mode banner shows when logged as Carlos.

backend: test_01_training_stats_endpoint_exists - Training stats endpoint returns 200 with valid structure
test_02_carlos_has_training_data - Carlos has 4 orders, 1 bill paid, $640 total
test_03_carlos_training_stats_fields - All required fields present (user_id, orders_count, items_practiced, etc)
test_04_admin_has_no_training_data - Admin returns zeros (no training data)
test_06_nonexistent_user_returns_404 - Returns 404 for non-existent user ID
test_07_carlos_recent_activity_structure - Recent activity has id, total, status, date, items_count
frontend: Carlos profile shows 'ENTRENAMIENTO' badge in header
Carlos profile shows 'Progreso de Entrenamiento' collapsible section
Training stats display: 4 Ordenes, 1 Cobros Practicados, 1 Items Procesados, $640 Monto Practicado
Training timeline shows: Inicio (25 feb 2026), Ultima actividad (25-feb, 10:43 p.m.)
Admin profile does NOT show training section (correctly hidden)
Admin profile has no ENTRENAMIENTO badge
Training mode banner shows for Carlos: 'MODO ENTRENAMIENTO — Las transacciones NO se registran como ventas reales'
Training banner persists across pages (tables page verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing users. Carlos has training_mode=true with 4 training orders and 1 paid training bill ($640).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Dashboard verified. GET /api/users/{user_id}/training-stats returns orders_count, bills_paid, items_practiced, total_amount_practiced, first_activity, last_activity, recent_activity. Frontend UserConfig.js shows 'Progreso de Entrenamiento' section for users with training_mode=true OR orders_count>0. Section is collapsible with defaultOpen=user.training_mode.
